title: Enneagram Test
description: This test will help you discover your personality type and instinctual variant. It consists of several stages where you will select statements that best describe your behaviors and motivations.
rules: Read each question and available answers carefully.
Select the answers that best fit you (you don't always have to select the maximum number).
If you really can't decide, you can use a limited pool of skips.
The test is best taken in focus, following your first intuition.
extended_info: The extended version asks more questions for a more precise result.
unresolvable_instincts: Unfortunately, based on your answers, it was not possible to clearly determine the order of instincts.
unresolvable_type: Unfortunately, based on your answers, it was not possible to clearly determine your Enneagram type.
skips_remaining: Number of questions you can skip: {count}
auto_confirm_single_help: When a question allows only one answer, selecting it will immediately confirm and move to the next question.
lead_progress_desc: Progress bars show the distance of individual instincts from the required difference thresholds.

exceptions.unresolvableTie: It was not possible to clearly determine your type based on the answers provided. This may be due to ambiguous choices. Please restart the test.
